description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a dark exterior and large, arched windows on the front facade, giving it a modern suburban appearance. The ground level includes three garage doors, with the main entryway situated between the garages and highlighted by a set of steps. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, each painted in distinct pastel colors, and includes visible furnishings such as beds, tables, and kitchen appliances. The rear and side facades are simpler, with regularly spaced rectangular windows and no additional ornamentation. The roof is flat, providing a clean, contemporary silhouette. The overall design suggests a spacious, family-oriented residence suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark exterior, large arched front windows, three garages, and a flat roof. The interior is divided into colorful, furnished rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing three garage doors, large arched windows, the main entryway with steps, and a glimpse of the colorful interior rooms.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a long, dark facade with regularly spaced rectangular windows and a visible back door.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a plain wall with several rectangular windows and a clear view of the interior room layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more rectangular windows and a visible section of the interior, including bedrooms and living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows on the front and rectangular windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, flanked by three garage doors and large arched windows, no porch or columns
